texto: In the meantime, Mary's mother continued to stock her daughter's 'bottom drawer' which she started when Mary was only five years old. When we got engaged the 'drawer' was already well stocked but by the time we got married it was more like a well-endowed wardrobe.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John L. Fear: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “In the meantime, Mary's mother continued to stock her daughter's 'bottom drawer' which she starte…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, memoir, drawer pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
